entry.title: Warm welcome
entry.content:
Welcom to my blog, I will share my journey as a Software Engineer and Student at this blog.

You can find related post you are interesting about by look into categories and tags. All my post will have tags and categories to help you serch through my blog.

There is also a projects page that links to my github page so that you can browse my github project and learn my project.

If you want to know more about me, you can go to about page. There is some information about me.

I am happy to see you visit my blog. Happy coding!
